name: rake
description: A ruby build program with capabilities similar to make

name: -n
--dry-run
options.description: Do a dry run without executing actions

name: -I
--libdir
options.description: Include LIBDIR in the search path for required modules

name: -P
--prereqs
options.description: Display the tasks and dependencies, then exit

name: -q
--quiet
options.description: Do not log messages to standard output

name: -s
--silent
options.description: Like --quiet, but also suppresses the 'in directory' announcement

name: -T
--tasks
options.description: Display the tasks and dependencies, then exit

name: -t
--trace
options.description: Turn on invoke/execute tracing, enable full backtrace
